actors: Red Team admin (primary — create, launch, monitor, configure alerts, re-tag)
Read-only viewer (results view only, no export)
key_fields: Channel selection (SMS, WhatsApp; Viber/Telegram/Vishing Coming Soon)
Group picker with per-channel coverage indicator
People-search component with per-user channel chips
Message editor with channel tabs (SMS + WhatsApp in multi-channel mode)
Compliance Pre-flight checklist (carrier whitelist, API status, consent docs)
Fallback routing selector (Fall back to SMS / Surface error / Silent exclude)
Test send confirmation checkboxes per channel
integrations: Risk Scoring Engine (assumed isolated from simulation pipeline)
open_questions_flagged: Risk pipeline: isolated or integrated with simulations?
WhatsApp Business API custom message feasibility — template-only or arbitrary?
Template library: red-team-specific or shared with simulations?
Compliance acknowledgment copy requires legal review
Sub-admin RBAC visibility (department managers, compliance viewers)
Vishing architecture (Dune-managed VOIP vs. manual outcome recording) — out of v1 scope
Workday integration ETA for Employee ID
Email alert AWS API connection readiness
confidence_notes: All six existing knowledge files were present and internally consistent. Design strategy was fully resolved (Option B selected, 8-step wizard confirmed, all step names defined). Conversation states and in-progress dashboard spec were confirmed in design-strategy.json and user-flow.md. No Figma file was used — copy and field labels are derived from user-flow.md and design-strategy.json rather than a shipped design. Open questions are documented as Gaps; they do not block the PRD from being a complete and actionable working document.
